song.title: Overwhelmed
song.lyrics:
Intro: . G - - / Am / Em - - / C (x2) [V1] . C G I see the works of Your Hands . D Em D C Galaxies spin in a Heavenly dance oh God . G D All that You are is so overwhelming . C G I hear the sound of Your Voice . D Em D C All at once it’s a gentle and thundering noise oh God . G D All that You are is so overwhelming [C1] . G D I delight myself in You . Em C Captivated by Your beauty . G D Em C I’m overwhelmed, I’m overwhelmed by You . G D God, I run into Your arms . Em C Unashamed because of mercy . G D G - - / Am / Em - - / C I’m overwhelmed, I’m overwhelmed by You [V2] . C G I know the power of Your Cross . D Em D C Forgiven and free forever You’ll be my God . G D All that You’ve done is so overwhelming -!!
[C2] . G D I delight myself in You . Em C In the Glory of Your Presence . G D Em C I’m overwhelmed, I’m overwhelmed by You . G D God, I run into Your arms . Em C Unashamed because of mercy . G D G - - / Am / Em - - / C I’m overwhelmed, I’m overwhelmed by You [B] . G D You are Beautiful, You are Beautiful . C Oh God, there is no one more Beautiful . G D C You are Beautiful, God you are the most Beautiful||
. G D You are Wonderful, You are Wonderful . C Oh God, there is no one more Wonderful . G D C You are Wonderful, God You are the most Wonderful||
. G D You are Glorious, You are Glorious . C Oh God, there is no one more Glorious . G D C You are Glorious, God you are the most Glorious [C3] . G D I delight myself in You . Em C In the Glory of Your Presence . G D Em C I'm overwhelmed, I’m overwhelmed by You . G D God, I run into Your arms . Em C Unashamed because of mercy . G D Em C I’m overwhelmed, I’m overwhelmed by You . G D G - - / Am / Em - - / C I'm overwhelmed, I'm overwhelmed by You.
song.presentation: V1 C1 V2 C1 B C3
